name: Availability
description: Implementation of the 'Availability' model. A staff availability entry

SessionType.description: Contains information about the types of sessions.

StartDateTime.description: The date and time the availability starts in the site local time zone.

EndDateTime.description: The date and time the availability ends in the site local time zone.

BookableEndDateTime.description: The time of day that the last appointment can start in the site local time zone.

IsMasked.description: When `true`, indicates that the staff member's name for availabilty is masked. When `false`, indicates that the staff member's name for availabilty is not masked.

ShowPublic.description: When `true`, indicates that the schedule is shown to the clients. When `false`, indicates that the schedule is hidden from the clients.

ResourceAvailabilities.description: Contains information about resources availability for the specified session type.
